chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-242 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1) For orders on M.A No.1815/25 (urgency). 2) For orders on office objections. 3) For orders on M.A No.1816/25. 4) For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Burdi, Advocate for applicants/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Counsel for the applicants/accused is seeking Protective Bail for applicants/accused (i) Muhammad Ramzan s/o Wali Muhammad Arain (ii) Shahbaz Ali s/o Muhammad Ramzan Arain (iii) Awais Ali s/o Muhammad Ramzan Arain in Crime No.02 of 2025 registered at Police Station Women & Children SBA U/s 394, 506/2, 354, 457, 337A(i), F(i) & L(ii) PPC. The learned counsel for the applicants/accused submits that the applicants/accused apprehend their arrest at the hands of police officials although the applicants/accused want to surrender themselves before the learned trial court, therefore, they seek protective bail. Be that as it may, this is a case of protective bail, which is hereby granted to the applicants/accused in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand Only) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for a period of Seven days. Applicants/accused are directed to surrender themselves and join the investigation within stipulated time. Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicants/accused surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended.

Applicants/accused are directed to surrender themselves and join the investigation within stipulated time. Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicants/accused surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicants/accused fail to appear/surrender before the concerned court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by them before this court shall automatically stands forfeited. This Protective Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
